info.title: c2cs.Tool
info.description: C to C# library bindings code generator. In go .h file, out come .cs file.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: C2CS - C to C# bindings code generator.

commands.name: library
commands.description: Build a C library for the purposes of FFI (foreign function interface) with other languages such as C#.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate C# code from a cross-platform abstract syntax tree (AST) '.json' file.
